Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission (MPPSC) has released Assistant Town Planner ATP Recruitment Notification 2026. Those candidates who are Interested in this Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission ATP Recruitment Exam 2026 can Apply Online from 01/07/2026 to 31/07/2026 . Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Practice Test, pay scale and all other information.

Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission (MPPSC) MPPSC Assistant Town Planner ATP Recruitment 2025 MPPSC Advt. No. 02/2026 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® Official : WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 01/07/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 3 1 /07/2026 Last Date Pay Exam Fee : 31/07/2026 Correction Last Date : 05 July to 02 August 2026 Last Date with Late Fee : 26/08/2026 Exam Date : As per Schedule Admit Card Available : Before Exam Answer Key Available : After Exam Result Status : After Exam

Application Fee General / Other State : 540/- OBC / SC / ST : 210/- Portal Charges: Rs. 40/- Late Fee : 3000-25000/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking
